candidates.label: Fee and Employment Practice
candidates.definition: Fee and Employment Practice (Bankruptcy) refers to the legal work related to the compensation of professionals and employment issues in the context of bankruptcy proceedings.

candidates.label: Service
candidates.definition: The legal work performed, usually by a Legal Services Provider, in the course of a legal matter.

candidates.label: Discrimination Law
candidates.definition: Protection from discrimination on grounds such as race, gender, sexual orientation, national origin, color, age, political affiliation, ethnicity, religion, and disability.

candidates.label: Employment Discrimination Law
candidates.definition: Law relating to protected class employment discrimination including retaliation and harassment
synonyms: Loi sur la discrimination en matière d'emploi

candidates.label: Discrimination Law
candidates.definition: Protection from discrimination on grounds such as race, gender, sexual orientation, national origin, color, age, political affiliation, ethnicity, religion, and disability.

candidates.label: Age Discrimination
candidates.definition: Discrimination against an individual or group based on their age, typically in the workplace or other professional settings.

candidates.label: Employment Discrimination Claims
candidates.definition: A claim made by an employee alleging unfair treatment or disparate impact based on a protected characteristic such as race, gender, age, or disability in the workplace.
synonyms: Actions en discrimination en matière d'emploi

candidates.label: Discrimination Claims
candidates.definition: Discrimination Claims refer to legal actions taken by individuals who have been subjected to unfair treatment based on their protected characteristics, such as race, gender, religion, disability, or age, in various contexts such as employment, housing, or public accommodations.

candidates.label: Wage and Hour Law
candidates.definition: Law that governs the wages rates an employer can pay its employees, the hours for which an employer must compensate its employees, child labor laws and meal and break laws.
synonyms: Droit du travail et des salaires
賃金および労働時間法

candidates.label: Wage
candidates.definition: A wage is a payment or income earned by an individual in exchange for their labor or services, typically provided on an hourly, daily, weekly, or monthly basis. It represents the compensation received for work performed and is often subject to taxes and deductions.

candidates.label: Wage and Hour Law
candidates.definition: Law that governs the wages rates an employer can pay its employees, the hours for which an employer must compensate its employees, child labor laws and meal and break laws.
synonyms: Droit du travail et des salaires
賃金および労働時間法

candidates.label: Workplace Safety Claim
candidates.definition: A workplace safety claim is a legal action initiated by an employee against their employer for not providing a safe working environment. The claim typically arises when an employer does not comply with applicable safety regulations, which can result in dangerous or hazardous working conditions for employees. Workplace safety claims can involve issues such as inadequate safety equipment, lack of proper training, or unsafe working conditions. Employees may bring workplace safety claims for injuries or illnesses suffered as a result of their employer's failure to provide a safe working environment.
synonyms: Reclamación de seguridad en el lugar de trabajo
Reclamo de seguridad en el lugar de trabajo
Reivindicação de segurança no local de trabalho
Réclamation de sécurité sur le lieu de travail

candidates.label: Employment Health and Safety Law
candidates.definition: Law governing the health and safety of employees.
synonyms: Droit de la santé et de la sécurité au travail
Lei de Saúde e Segurança no Trabalho
Ley de Salud y Seguridad en el Empleo

items.item_text: Substance Abuse and Drug Testing Law

candidates.label: Substance Abuse and Drug Testing Law
candidates.definition: Drug Testing & Substance Abuse Law refers to the legal framework governing the testing of individuals for the presence of drugs and the regulation of substance abuse. It includes policies, procedures, and regulations related to the detection, prevention, and treatment of drug use and addiction.

hierarchy_path.label: Substance Abuse and Drug Testing Law

candidates.label: Workplace Safety Claim
candidates.definition: A workplace safety claim is a legal action initiated by an employee against their employer for not providing a safe working environment. The claim typically arises when an employer does not comply with applicable safety regulations, which can result in dangerous or hazardous working conditions for employees. Workplace safety claims can involve issues such as inadequate safety equipment, lack of proper training, or unsafe working conditions. Employees may bring workplace safety claims for injuries or illnesses suffered as a result of their employer's failure to provide a safe working environment.
synonyms: Reclamación de seguridad en el lugar de trabajo
Reclamo de seguridad en el lugar de trabajo
Reivindicação de segurança no local de trabalho
Réclamation de sécurité sur le lieu de travail

candidates.label: Wrongful Discharge or Termination
candidates.definition: The concept of Wrongful Discharge or Termination refers to the illegal firing or dismissal of an employee by an employer, in violation of the law or employment contract.
synonyms: פיטורים בלתי חוקיים או סיום חוקי

candidates.label: Reduction in Force Law
candidates.definition: Reduction in Force (RIF) law pertains to the legal framework and regulations governing the process of reducing an organization's workforce, typically due to budgetary constraints, restructuring, or downsizing. It includes provisions related to employee rights, notice requirements, severance packages, and discrimination laws to ensure fair and lawful implementation of workforce reductions.

candidates.label: Workers Compensation Law
candidates.definition: Law addressing wage replacement and medical benefits to employees injured in the course of employment.
synonyms: Droit de la compensation des travailleurs

candidates.label: Unemployment Benefits Law
candidates.definition: Unemployment benefits refer to those benefits given by the government to unemployed persons.
synonyms: Loi sur les allocations de chômage
חוק זכויות למען עזרה בביטוח אבטלה

candidates.label: Unemployment Payments
candidates.definition: Unemployment Payments are financial benefits provided by the government to individuals who are temporarily out of work and meet certain eligibility requirements. These payments aim to provide temporary financial assistance to help cover living expenses while individuals search for new employment.

candidates.label: Employment Benefits
candidates.definition: Employment Benefits are additional compensations or advantages provided to employees over and above their regular salary, often as part of an employment contract. These benefits may include healthcare, retirement plans, paid time off, and other perks designed to attract and retain employees.

candidates.label: Workers' Compensation Claim
candidates.definition: A Workers' Compensation Claim is a legal claim made by an employee seeking benefits for injuries or illnesses that occurred in the course of their employment.

candidates.label: Workers' Compensation Discrimination Claim
candidates.definition: A workers' compensation discrimination claim is a legal action brought by an employee who alleges that they have been subjected to unfair treatment, retaliation, or adverse actions by their employer due to filing a workers' compensation claim or exercising their rights under workers' compensation laws. Workers' compensation is a system designed to provide medical benefits and wage replacement for employees who suffer work-related injuries or illnesses. Employers are generally prohibited from discriminating or retaliating against employees who seek workers' compensation benefits.
synonyms: Reclamação de discriminação de compensação de trabalhadores
Reclamo por discriminación de compensación de trabajadores
Reclamo por discriminación en compensación de trabajadores
Réclamation pour discrimination en matière de compensation des travailleurs
תביעה על הפרת זכויות עובדים בקבלת פיצויים
